classification.category_basis:
用于识别动力连接器或电源接口的针脚/接线定义，包括动力接口 pinout、引脚编号与针脚功能对应关系、针脚名称、U/V/W/PE、L/N/PE、DC+/DC-、P+/P-、Brake+/Brake-、制动器、电源正负极、保护地、相线、线色、线径、端子号、接线说明、连接器针位图、针脚分配表。

必须同时满足：
1. 出现连接器针脚、端子或接口信息；
2. 至少有一个针脚编号与功能、信号名、线色、线序、电源极性、相线、保护地或接线关系对应。

仅有引脚编号，但没有功能定义，不应归入本类。
仅出现 Power Wire、Housing、Terminal、连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、连接器安装位置、接插件外形图、插头/插座物料信息时，不应归入本类。
仅显示 1/2/3/4 等孔位编号和 Housing/Terminal 型号，应归入 connector_housing_terminal 或 connector_structure，不应归入 power_connector_pinout。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪位于完整图中'Connector Detail (Power Wire)'区域，表格列出'PIN'、'FUNCTION'、'COLOR'，并给出1到4号针脚对应'MOTOR U'、'MOTOR V'、'MOTOR W'、'MOTOR PE'及线色，属于动力电机相线和保护地的针脚接线定义。

classification.reason: 目标框内为四孔连接器外形与孔位编号示意，并标注'Housing:H66L6-04P'和'Terminal:T66L6-B'型号；结合完整图可知其位于动力线连接器细节区域，但该裁剪内没有针脚功能、线色或接线对应表，因此最接近机械结构/连接器外形类。

engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Main body length is 217±1.5 mm and maximum overall height is 95 mm.
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Power wire uses Housing:H66L6-04P and Terminal:T66L6-B; brake wire uses Housing:H66L6-02P and Terminal:T66L6-B; feedback connector is DB 15M.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标区域是电机前端法兰和线缆出线的局部结构视图，包含安装孔数量与孔径'4xφ6.5'、定位圆或外径'φ90±0.1'、外形高度'80'、线缆长度'L>300'及角度'45°'等尺寸标注，没有针脚功能、线色或接线表信息，因此归入机械尺寸。

text_annotations.correction_note: Corrected OCR text from 4x6.5 to 4xφ6.5 based on visible diameter symbol and mounting-hole callout.
Corrected OCR fragment 5 to full visible angular callout 45°.
Corrected OCR ∅80 to 80 because the callout is used as a vertical envelope dimension, not a diameter dimension.
Corrected OCR text from 90±0.1 to φ90±0.1 based on visible diameter symbol.

terminology_notes: φ denotes diameter; x denotes quantity multiplier; ± denotes bilateral tolerance.

dimension_records.reason: The callout is attached by a leader to the right cable/connector outlet and specifies the minimum lead length.
The callout is attached by a leader to the left cable/connector outlet and specifies the lead length requirement.
Leader points to the corner mounting holes; 4xφ6.5 is a standard hole quantity and diameter notation.
The angular dimension arc near the mounting-hole pattern indicates a 45 degree angular spacing or orientation.
The vertical dimension line spans the square flange outer edges, indicating an overall envelope dimension.
The diameter tolerance callout is connected to the dashed circular pattern through the mounting holes, indicating pitch circle diameter.

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Four φ6.5 mounting holes on a φ90±0.1 pitch circle, with 45° angular positioning indicated.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Flange outside height is 80 mm; cable/connector lead length callouts indicate L≥300 or L>300 depending on side.
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Left and right cable outlets include minimum lead length requirements around 300 mm.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: Several OCR detections are linework or overlapping fragments and were removed; exact left/right inequality difference is preserved as detected.

unresolved_items.issue: Left and right connector length callouts use different inequality symbols in OCR/visible evidence: L>300 and L≥300.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别电机性能曲线类图纸或图表，包括扭矩-转速曲线、转速-扭矩关系、连续扭矩、峰值扭矩、间歇扭矩、额定扭矩、最大扭矩、转速范围、额定转速、最高转速、工作区间、S1/S2/S3 工作制、短时运行区、连续运行区、功率曲线、效率曲线等。典型特征是坐标轴、曲线、工作区域、转速单位 rpm/r/min、扭矩单位 Nm/N·m。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域在完整图纸左下角标注框内，标题为'Performance Curve'，包含纵轴'T(N.m)'、横轴'n(rpm)'、连续'Continuous'与间歇'Intermittent'两条扭矩-转速曲线，并标出3.18、3.5、9.54、10.5、5500等关键扭矩和转速数值，属于电机扭矩-转速性能曲线。

text_annotations.correction_note: Corrected spacing from OCR text PerformanceCurve; overlapping split OCR ocr_002 and ocr_003 omitted as duplicates.
Kept ocr_010 as the y-axis tick value; overlapping ocr_011 reading 9 is inconsistent with axis sequence and omitted.
Corrected OCR misread ∅09 to 6000 based on x-axis tick sequence.

drawing_metadata.unit_assumption: Units are explicitly shown as N.m for torque and rpm for speed; no mechanical length unit is specified in this crop

terminology_notes: T(N.m) is interpreted as torque in N·m.
n(rpm) is interpreted as rotational speed in revolutions per minute.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框位于整张外形图右下方参数表中的环境条件区域，内容为'Temperature'、'Humidity'、'Environment'和'Installation altitude'等表格数据，不含扭矩转速坐标曲线，也不含连接器针脚功能或反馈信号定义；在给定类别中最接近整张机械外形/技术数据图纸的机械尺寸类。
